iot.thingtype.thingtypeproperties.CfnAbo: The ThingTypeProperties contains information about the thing type including: a thing type description, and a list of searchable thing attribute names.

iot.thingtype.thingtypeproperties.Search.Description: A list of searchable thing attribute names.

iot.thingtype.thingtypeproperties.ThingT.Description: The description of the thing type.
